bug.description: use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed

prompt:
There is a use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed downstream of function LL_TIM_Init in the targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32G4 subsystem.
The function is located at targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32G4/STM32Cube_FW/STM32G4xx_HAL_Driver/stm32g4xx_ll_tim.c:334.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
